messages.content:
Summarize the vulnerability in professional cybersecurity language.

Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command ('SQL Injection') vulnerability in Ekol Informatics Website Template allows SQL Injection.This issue affects Website Template: through 20231215.
The vulnerability is an SQL Injection flaw within the Ekol Informatics Website Template that allows unauthorized SQL commands to be executed. This affects versions up to December 15, 2023.
